## Type of change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change
- [ ] 📚 Docs only
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor / chore

## Checklist
- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] No new dependencies, or new dep is justified in the description
- [ ] Tested on mobile viewport (Chrome DevTools or a real phone)
- [ ] If touching SQL: added a new numbered file under `supabase/migrations/`, never edited an existing one
- [ ] If touching scoring or RLS: explained the reasoning in the PR body
- [ ] Updated README / CONTRIBUTING / How-to-play if behavior visibly changes
